description.en:
PropertyScout ID 820935


1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 38 squaremeters, located on the 22nd floor, at Supalai Veranda Rama 9
building, in the popular Huai Khwang district near MRT Thailand Cultural Centre and near ARL Ramkhamhaeng. Please contact us to
schedule a viewing.

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2019
 * 24-hours security
 * Sauna
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Gym
 * Security cameras
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * Kids play area
 * Open car park

summary.th: เช่า: 2 นอน 75 ตร.ม. ราคา 38,000 บาท (DotProperty #e1c63a02a170-158f-e062-d649-9b93a089)

description.en:
This 75 Sqm 2 bedroom 2 bathroom unit

 

– offers ensuite baths with built-in quality closets and amazing city views.

 

– Fully equipped kitchen is completely fitted with equipment that comprises every contemporary built-in appliance.

 

– The living area has a dining room, Sofa, large TV, large storage room, washer room.

 

– The dining and living areas are spacious with beautiful city view from the balcony which ensures cool breeze any time of the year.
